displayTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story Adaptation
synopsis: The Rebellion is here! The biggest movie of the year jumps from the big screen to the comic book page! All looks lost for the Rebellion against the Empire as they learn of the existence of a new super-weapon — the Death Star. New heroes Jyn Erso and Cassian Andor set out on a desperate mission to steal the plans to destroy the new super-weapon.
title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story Adaptation
